title: "The Pedigree Of Honey"
content:
The pedigree of honey
    Does not concern the bee;
    A clover, any time, to him
    Is aristocracy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in ""The Pedigree Of Honey""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
